notes: unsupported clean option guard is classified as stock-compatible invalid input with exit code, empty stdout and usage diagnostic parity
unsupported clean short-switch guard is classified as stock-compatible invalid input with exit code, empty stdout and usage diagnostic parity
missing short exclude pattern is classified as stock-compatible invalid input with exit code, empty stdout and diagnostic parity
missing long exclude pattern is classified as stock-compatible invalid input with exit code, empty stdout and diagnostic parity

repo_state: untracked file and directories plus ignored paths
notes: default dry-run output lists top-level untracked files like stock Git

repo_state: untracked file and directories plus ignored paths
notes: dry-run with directory traversal lists untracked directories like stock Git
path-limited dry-run with directory traversal matches stock Git
ignored-only dry-run output matches stock Git
ignored-only dry-run with directories matches stock Git
all-untracked dry-run with directories matches stock Git
default clean without force exits like stock Git when clean.requireForce is true

repo_state: untracked file and directories plus ignored paths
notes: force clean removes untracked files/directories, preserves ignored/tracked paths and leaves status like stock Git
interactive clean with no candidates matches stock Git silent success
interactive quit flow matches stock Git exit code, stdout, stderr and preserved untracked file
interactive quit alias matches stock Git exit code, stdout, stderr and preserved untracked file
interactive quit command number matches stock Git exit code, stdout, stderr and preserved untracked file
interactive EOF quit matches stock Git exit code, stdout, stderr and preserved untracked file
interactive help command number then quit matches stock Git exit code, stdout, stderr and preserved untracked file
interactive help alias then quit matches stock Git exit code, stdout, stderr and preserved untracked file
unknown interactive command prints stock Huh diagnostic, re-prompts, accepts quit and preserves the untracked file
